options.name: -assignBump
options.description: assigns bump after area I/O placement

options.name: -fast
options.description: runs area I/O placement in the fast mode

options.name: -hardFence
options.description: restricts the area I/O placement to the power domain fence

options.name: -ignoreAIOByCellName
options.description: specifies the cell name of I/O instances not to place

options.name: -ignoreAIOByName
options.description: specifies the I/O instance name not to place

options.name: -maxDistance
options.description: the maximum allowable distance betweenthe I/O driver cells and the bumps

options.name: -packing
options.description: specifies the packing of I/O driver cellswithin each cluster of rows
